selected_topic: Reuters AI News reports breakthrough developments in AI technology trends and global impact.
news_angle: Turn this AI breakthrough news into a cinematic, funny visual metaphor featuring Hunk Mao as an astronaut navigating the cosmos of crypto and AI.
scene_metaphor: Hunk Mao as a stylish astronaut-cat piloting a sleek, futuristic rocket labeled with a subtle AI brain emblem, zooming through a vibrant jewel-toned space filled with tiny floating crypto coins and data streams as stars, celebrating a breakthrough in AI tech from Reuters. Around him, quirky floating objects like a mini satellite shaped like a cat paw, and a crypto coin melting like a comet tail create a playful sci-fi vibe.
image_prompt: Create a square cinematic anime editorial illustration featuring Hunk Mao, a compact athletic orange tabby cat with expressive large eyes and a mischievous confident grin, dressed in a sleek modern astronaut suit with subtle orange tabby stripes incorporated. He pilots a futuristic rocket flying fast through a jewel-toned cosmic background full of data stream stars, floating crypto coins, and tiny sci-fi props like a cat-paw shaped satellite. The scene has a glossy premium anime finish with cinematic lighting and atmospheric depth. Visual storytelling includes symbols of AI and crypto without overt corporate logos, emphasizing an adventurous breakthrough vibe.
easter_eggs: tiny Reuters newspaper clipping floating in space, crypto coins shaped as stars with slight AI circuitry patterns, a small playful comet that looks like a burning bitcoin symbol fading into the cosmos, a cheeky star shaped like Hunk Mao’s face, subtle background silhouette of a futuristic city orbiting a planet, tiny robotic mouse astronaut on a remote moon.
caption: Reuters highlights a major AI technology breakthrough impacting global markets. Hunk Mao’s ready to rocket crypto and AI to a whole new galaxy—moonwalk not included.
risk_notes: Safe: No political or controversial themes, no financial advice, humorous and clear depiction, all fictional embellishments grounded in factual AI breakthrough news.
